rationale: Both reviews block and give materially identical scope guidance — remove the bundled AffineAlgGroup, the vacuous IsUnipotent, and the True-stub ReductiveGroup/SemisimpleGroup classes, and build the prerequisite layers first — all of which I confirmed against the diff (the bundling, the (g-1) nilpotence test, and the True fields are all present). Review 2's extra GroupLike-vs-points observation is a correctness nuance rather than a scope concern, so acting on either review yields an equivalently improved PR for this angle.
